projects.title: Clinic Management System
projects.tagline: A modern patient and appointment management platform.
projects.description: A full-stack clinic management application that enables patient registration, appointment booking, medical history management with image uploads, and secure authentication. Designed with scalability and clean architecture in mind.

projects.title: TaskFlow
projects.description: A MERN stack Todo application with authentication, task prioritization, CRUD operations, and responsive UI. Built to practice scalable frontend architecture and backend API development.

projects.title: Splitwise Clone
projects.tagline: Track expenses and settle balances effortlessly.
projects.description: An expense sharing application that allows users to create groups, add expenses, calculate balances, and manage settlements using efficient backend business logic.

projects.title: Developer Portfolio
projects.tagline: A personal portfolio showcasing my work and journey.
projects.description: A modern, responsive portfolio website built with React and TypeScript featuring smooth animations, project showcase, timeline, and contact section.
